title: Portal 2 Long Fall Boots
description: Adds the Portal 2 Long Fall Boots to Minecraft! And its survival friendly! As long as you consider 8 netherite survival friendly.
body:
Ever wanted to jump from any heights and take no damage? This is the correct mod for you! This mod adds the Long Fall Boots from Portal 2, with a custom model and a crafting recipe, allowing you to craft it in survival mode.

![The crafting recipe of the 2 items](https://i.imgur.com/GWbp97z.gif "The crafting recipe of the 2 items")

![Requires Geckolib 4.5.4](https://camo.githubusercontent.com/7ca383c441116b7b61d8dc568c0c42c829ac05a605d05d1190be25029ed5000d/68747470733a2f2f692e696d6775722e636f6d2f4b42396b5259562e706e67 "Requires Geckolib 4.5.4")
